title: Premium Airport Lounge Face Recognition Entry System

requirements.text: Implement a backend actor that stores and manages member records with fields: name, membership tier (e.g., Gold, Platinum, Diamond), and a mock facial feature hash. Expose query and update functions: addMember, getMembers, getMemberById, and a simulateVerification function that accepts a mock image hash and returns a verification result object (passengerName, membershipTier, confidenceScore, verificationTime, accessGranted).
acceptanceCriteria: addMember stores a new member with name and membership tier
getMembers returns the full member list
simulateVerification returns a structured result with all required fields
accessGranted is a Bool reflecting whether a match was found

requirements.text: Build a top navigation bar containing exactly four links: 'Live Entry', 'Member Management', 'Entry Logs', and 'Security & System Status'. The nav bar should be fixed to the top, use a white or soft-grey background, subtle bottom shadow, and smooth scroll to the corresponding page section on click. Do not include any other navigation items.

quotes: Create a simple top navigation bar containing ONLY: Live Entry, Member Management, Entry Logs, Security & System Status

acceptanceCriteria: Exactly four navigation links are visible
Clicking each link smoothly scrolls to the correct section
Nav bar remains fixed during scroll
No booking, login, or travel-related links are present

requirements.text: Create a full-width Hero Section (Section 1) at the top of the homepage. Display the title 'Premium Lounge AI – Face Recognition Entry System', a short professional subtitle describing the system, and use the generated lounge hero background image as the section background. Overlay a subtle dark gradient for text legibility. Typography should be elegant and spacious.

quotes: Title: 'Premium Lounge AI – Face Recognition Entry System'

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section fills the viewport width
Title and subtitle are clearly readable over the background
Background image is the generated lounge hero asset
Section has a dark gradient overlay

requirements.text: Create a Face Detection Section (Section 2) with a centered card containing a simulated camera feed area (static placeholder with a face detection bounding-box frame overlay drawn with CSS or SVG), a pulsing scan animation around the frame, and explanatory text describing the face recognition capture process.

quotes: Camera interface displayed inside a clean card

acceptanceCriteria: Card is centered with subtle shadow
Bounding-box frame overlay is visible inside the camera area
Pulsing scan animation runs continuously
Explanatory text is present below or beside the camera card

requirements.text: Create an AI Processing Section (Section 3) displaying a three-step workflow using structured information blocks or a stepper component: Step 1 – 'Capturing Image', Step 2 – 'Extracting Facial Features', Step 3 – 'Matching Premium Member Database'. Each step should have an icon, label, and a short description. Include a subtle animated progress indicator between steps.
acceptanceCriteria: All three steps are displayed in order
Each step has a distinct icon, label, and description
A progress or connector line/animation links the steps
Layout is clean and horizontally or vertically structured

requirements.text: Create a Verification Result Section (Section 4) that calls simulateVerification from the backend and displays an information panel with: Passenger Name, Membership Tier, Confidence Score, and Verification Time. Below the panel, show a large status badge: green 'Access Granted' or red 'Access Denied' based on the result. Include a 'Run Verification' button that triggers the backend call and animates the result reveal.
acceptanceCriteria: All four data fields are displayed in a clean information panel
Status badge correctly renders green for granted and red for denied
'Run Verification' button triggers the backend simulateVerification call
Result animates into view after the call completes

requirements.text: Create an Access Confirmation Section (Section 5) that shows a clean confirmation card with the message 'Access Authorized – Welcome to Premium Lounge' using premium typography. Include a checkmark icon and a soft green accent. This section should be conditionally styled (confirmation vs. denial state) based on the verification result from Section 4.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirmation card displays the required message
Checkmark icon is visible on granted state
Card style changes to a denial state (e.g., red accent, X icon) when access is denied
Section is visually distinct and prominent

requirements.text: Create a Member Management section (accessible via nav and as a full page section) that lists existing members in a clean table or card grid, and provides a form to add a new member (name, membership tier). The form should call the addMember backend function and refresh the list on success.
acceptanceCriteria: Member list renders all stored members with name and tier
Add member form has name and tier fields
Submitting the form calls addMember and refreshes the list
Empty state message is shown when no members exist

requirements.text: Create an Entry Logs section (accessible via nav) that displays a chronological log of verification attempts. Each log entry should show timestamp, passenger name (or 'Unknown'), result (Granted / Denied), and confidence score. Log data should be stored in the backend and populated on each simulateVerification call.
acceptanceCriteria: Entry logs list is displayed in reverse-chronological order
Each entry shows timestamp, name, result, and confidence score
A new log entry is created each time simulateVerification is called
Empty state message is shown when no logs exist

requirements.text: Create a Security & System Status section (accessible via nav) that displays a system health dashboard with static but realistic status indicators: Face Recognition Engine (Online), Database Connection (Secure), Camera Feed (Active), Last System Check (timestamp). Use green/amber/red status dots for each indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: At least four system status indicators are displayed
Each indicator has a colored status dot (green = OK)
Last System Check shows a realistic timestamp
Layout is clean and dashboard-like

requirements.text: Apply a consistent premium light theme across the entire application: white or soft-grey (#F5F5F7 range) backgrounds, deep charcoal or near-black typography, gold or muted teal as the primary accent color, generous whitespace, elegant sans-serif typography (e.g., Inter or similar), subtle card shadows, and smooth CSS scroll-behavior. Minimal micro-animations on hover and section reveal. No blue/purple color palette.

quotes: Light theme with white or soft grey background
Subtle shadows and soft depth effects
The interface should feel calm, premium, and trustworthy

acceptanceCriteria: All sections use the defined light theme palette
Gold or muted teal accent is consistently applied to CTAs, badges, and highlights
Smooth scroll is active for all nav links
Cards have subtle box shadows
Typography is elegant and hierarchically consistent

requirements.text: Render the generated hero background image (lounge-hero.dim_1920x1080.png) as a static asset in the Hero Section background.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses lounge-hero.dim_1920x1080.png as its background image
Image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Image covers the full hero area with object-fit: cover

constraints: Do not include any airline booking, travel, flight search, or login features
Navigation must contain exactly four items: Live Entry, Member Management, Entry Logs, Security & System Status
Do not use blue or purple in the color palette
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor file
nonGoals: External database or third-party API integration

required: Wide panoramic airport premium lounge interior — warm ambient lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows with runway view, plush seating, marble surfaces, soft gold and white tones, no people, ultra-clean and luxurious atmosphere (lounge-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
